snippet: @DenisValerievichMayorov, your fine-grained personal access token has expired. Hey DenisValerievichMayorov! Your fine-grained personal access token (GeminiWeatherAction) has expired. If this token is
subject: [GitHub] Your fine-grained personal access token has expired
body:
Hey DenisValerievichMayorov,

Your fine-grained personal access token "GeminiWeatherAction", has expired.

If this token is still needed, visit https://github.com/settings/personal-access-tokens/12647756/regenerate to generate an equivalent.

If you run into problems, please contact support by visiting https://github.com/contact

Thanks,
The GitHub Team
